session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan #8766 implementation complete. PR submitted: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8766
## Summary
**Changes made across 4 source files + 2 pre-existing prettier fixes:**
1. **`src/erk/agent_docs/models.py`** — Added `Lifecycle = Literal["raw", "staged", "promoted"]` type alias and two new optional fields (`lifecycle`, `promoted_to`) to `AgentDocFrontmatter`
2. **`src/erk/agent_docs/operations.py`** — Added validation for `lifecycle` (must be valid literal value), `promoted_to` (must be non-empty string), and cross-validation (promoted requires promoted_to and vice versa). Added filter in `collect_valid_docs` to exclude promoted docs from index generation while preserving tripwire collection.
3. **`tests/unit/agent_docs/test_validate_frontmatter.py`** — Added 9 tests covering all lifecycle/promoted_to validation cases (accepts raw/staged/promoted, rejects invalid values, cross-validation, empty string rejection, default None)
4. **`tests/unit/agent_docs/test_operations.py`** — Added 2 tests verifying promoted docs are excluded from index but their tripwires are still collected
All 5,897 tests pass, all CI checks green.
